title: Polymorphic Traveler's Backpack
body:
An add-on mod providing [Polymorph](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/polymorph) support for the Crafting Terminal and Pattern Encoding Terminal from [Traveler's Backpack](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/travelers-backpack-fabric), adding Polymorph's recipe selection button to these terminals in order to choose between conflicting crafting recipes instead of being forced to work with only one of these conflicting recipes within Traveler's Backpack.

                                       ![eg](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1152132/description_2119a38c-c44a-4f4c-a655-b2c7434bdd09.gif)
